docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REED, MARTIN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,635.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT REED, MARTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE $85.00 SERVED APR-09-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REED, MARTIN
